sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4679" key="a)lsokome/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλσο-κομέω</orth>, <sense id="n4679.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be keeper of a grove</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">precinct:</tr_>—also <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλσο-κομία</orth>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἡ;</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
